headline: Jim Cramer Says Darden “Almost Always Surprises to the Upside”
summary: Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE:DRI) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed as he said that the Iran peace negotiations could trigger an oil glut, cool inflation, and pull interest rates down. headline: Darden Gears Up for Q4 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: DRI heads into Q4 earnings with sales momentum at Olive Garden and LongHorn, but beef inflation and investments may pressure margins.

headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Best Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Centene, Darden Restaurants, Flutter Entertainment, GE Healthcare, IBM, Nike, SpaceX, Synopsys, Target, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower after a mixed start to trading on Monday, following the holiday-shortened week due to the Juneteenth Federal holiday. headline: Surging Institutional Support and Strong Metrics Could Be A Game Changer For Darden Restaurants (DRI)
summary: Recent research in June 2026 highlighted Darden Restaurants’ strong analyst support, improving financial metrics, and favorable technical signals, alongside rising institutional ownership exceeding total shares outstanding. A sharp quarter-over-quarter increase in institutional holdings, combined with resilient margins and brand strength at Olive Garden and LongHorn Steakhouse, is reinforcing confidence in Darden’s longer-term outlook. Against this backdrop of rising institutional...

headline: Evercore ISI Group Downgrades Darden Restaurants to In-Line, Maintains Price Target to $230
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst David Palmer   downgrades Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) from Outperform to In-Line and maintains the price target from $230 to $230.

headline: Morning Call Sheet: AI trade cools as SpaceX risks and earnings loom
summary: Matthew Powers, Managing Partner at Powers Advisory Group, Tony Zhang, Chief Strategist at OptionsPlay, and Jay Woods, Chief Market Strategist at Freedom Capital Markets, discuss the tech selloff, AI spending, SpaceX downside risks and key earnings from Micron and FedEx.
